title: Pratham Education Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Pratham Education Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pratham Education Capital India family as a Subject Matter Expert in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pratham Education Capital India:
Pratham Education Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education Capital India!
